content.theorem: Fortran column-major batch snap achieves 2.27B ops/sec on standard hardware
content.proof: Precomputed SQRT3/INV_SQRT3 in L1 cache + pure elemental functions enabling auto-SIMD + squared-distance comparison avoiding sqrt in hot path
content.caveat: Single-threaded; coarray parallelism projected 3-4× but untested on real multi-core
